mustPass: Home and contact routes are always present.
The scaffold must support both sales to employers and trust-building for a people-focused service business.
Service and process explanation must be central because the industry sells fit, speed and reliability rather than products.
Sections and routes must allow case, team and FAQ content because they are common proof and conversion tools in this industry.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Portfolio-first structure that hides the actual staffing or recruitment offer.
E-commerce patterns such as product grids or checkout-oriented flows.
Restaurant, clinic or booking-led route logic that does not fit staffing and recruitment services.
Claims about guaranteed hires, exact delivery speed or certifications unless the business can verify them.
Overweight candidate content on core sales pages aimed at employers.
